capacity: WA-I: 6,000 lbs (1,500 lbs per arm); WA-12: 9,000 lbs (2,250 lbs per arm)

chart_1_standard_installation.description: Wheel Base vs Outside Tire Width for System I, LMF-12 & TP-15

chart_2_longer_arms.description: Wheel Base vs Outside Tire Width with 5 inch longer arms and 5 inch longer sliders for LMF-12 & TP-15

installation_requirements.attachment_method: Quickly attach to the ends of the swing arms

WA-12.designed_for: All Mohawk LMF-12 or TP-15 Lifts

features: Wheel engaging adaptors for quick and easy vehicle setup
Especially useful for vehicles with hard to reach frames
Quickly attach to the ends of the swing arms
Compatible with standard installation width and longer arm configurations
Operating range charts provided for wheel base vs outside tire width
optional_equipment: 5 inch longer arms and 5 inch longer sliders (extends wheel base range to 140 inches)
certifications: ALI Member (note: WA-I and WA-12 are currently not ALI certified per REV 4/98)
notes: WA-I and WA-12 are currently not ALI certified (as of REV 4/98)
Specifications subject to change without notice
Top view shown with System IA with 120 inches between posts
Shaded areas on charts indicate operating ranges of WA-I and WA-12
